channel.title: Frontiers in Artificial Intelligence | New and Recent Articles
channel.description: Recent articles from Frontiers in Artificial Intelligence

item.title: HyRA-CXR: a hybrid residual-attention deep network for chest X-ray classification
item.description: This study presents HyRA-CXR, a novel hybrid architecture combining residual connections and attention mechanisms for chest X-ray classification. The model achieves state-of-the-art performance on the NIH ChestX-ray14 dataset, outperforming existing methods by 3.2% in mean AUC. We demonstrate the effectiveness of attention-based feature extraction for medical imaging diagnosis. Extensive experiments show the model's robustness across multiple disease categories. The proposed approach contributes to the growing body of literature on AI-assisted medical diagnosis and offers a practical tool for radiologists.
item.author: Wadhah Zeyad Tareq
